review_count.reviewContent: Delicious blend of pomegranate and orange!, good packaging
A delightful combination of pomegranate and orange!, Savor the goodness of real fruit juices!, Experience the authentic taste of Italy!

Repeat purchase. This is a seriously delicious fruit drink with the right amount of sweetness for a refreshing taste. Good size per serving for one person. I don’t drink sweet bevies, but always have these at home for friends who visit, they all enjoy it. Expiry date far out ~ Feb 2027

303602524.detail_text: Dietary Needs Nutri Grade C About Product SANPELLEGRINO Melograno e Arancia (Pomegranate & Orange) is a sparkling fruit beverage made with the juices of delicious oranges and pomegranate, offering a fresh, tart taste with a sweet finish. An Italian tradition since 1932, SANPELLEGRINO Sparkling Fruit Beverages have delighted the world with their authentic Italian taste. Simply peel back the foil cover and allow your senses to take in the sun-ripened fruit. Its unique and intense taste make every moment special and allow you to enjoy life deliziosa any time you choose. All the excellence of Italian citrus fruits go into every can or bottle of SANPELLEGRINO SPARKLING FRUIT BEVERAGES. The aroma and taste of these extraordinary beverages are products of the wonderful Mediterranean, known for its breathtaking landscapes, rich soils and temperate climate. Sanpellegrino selects the best lemons, oranges, grapefruits and chinotti cultivated and grown between the Mediterranean Sea and the volcanic land to passionately produce beverages that touch both the palate and the mind.

Carbonated Drinks: Made from spiral, cider, and carbonated beverages. Carbonated Water: This is a combination of carbonated water and carbonized water. Carbonated Drink: Made from carbonated beverage, this coated drink makes it a smooth, non-destructible carbonation drink. Carbonated Water: This is a combination of carbonated water and carbonized water. Lotte Chilsung Cider is a refreshing, colourless beverage containing no caffeine, artificial additives or colours. It has a lemon lime flavour and is one of Korea's iconic and best loved soft drinks
